tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Get the source code for a specific shadcn/ui v4 component

tools.name: get_component_demo
tools.description: Get demo code illustrating how a shadcn/ui v4 component should be used

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: Get all available shadcn/ui v4 components

tools.name: get_component_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific shadcn/ui v4 component

tools.name: get_directory_structure
tools.description: Get the directory structure of the shadcn-ui v4 repository

path.description: Path within the repository (default: v4 registry)

tools.name: get_block
tools.description: Get source code for a specific shadcn/ui v4 block (e.g., calendar-01, dashboard-01)

includeComponents.description: Whether to include component files for complex blocks (default: true)

tools.name: list_blocks
tools.description: Get all available shadcn/ui v4 blocks with categorization

category.description: Filter by category (calendar, dashboard, login, sidebar, products)

tools.name: apply_theme
tools.description: Apply a TweakCN theme preset to the project

dryRun.description: If true, returns preview instead of writing files

tools.name: get_theme
tools.description: Get details of a specific tweakcn theme

themeName.description: Name or ID of the theme to retrieve

resources.name: get_components
resources.description: List of available shadcn/ui components that can be used in the project

resources.name: get_theme_metadata
resources.description: Returns metadata about the currently configured theme

prompts.name: build-shadcn-page
prompts.description: Generate a complete shadcn/ui page using v4 components and blocks

arguments.name: pageType
arguments.description: Type of page to build (dashboard, login, calendar, sidebar, products, custom)

prompts.name: create-dashboard
prompts.description: Create a comprehensive dashboard using shadcn/ui v4 blocks and components

arguments.name: dashboardType
arguments.description: Type of dashboard (analytics, admin, user, project, sales)

arguments.name: widgets
arguments.description: Dashboard widgets needed (charts, tables, cards, metrics)

prompts.name: create-auth-flow
prompts.description: Generate authentication pages using shadcn/ui v4 login blocks

prompts.name: optimize-shadcn-component
prompts.description: Optimize or enhance existing shadcn/ui components with best practices

arguments.name: optimization
arguments.description: Type of optimization (performance, accessibility, responsive, animations)

arguments.name: useCase
arguments.description: Specific use case or context for the component

prompts.name: create-data-table
prompts.description: Create advanced data tables with shadcn/ui components

arguments.name: dataType
arguments.description: Type of data to display (users, products, orders, analytics)

arguments.name: features
arguments.description: Table features (sorting, filtering, pagination, search, selection)

findings.title: MCP server exposes tools with completable arguments
findings.description: 8 tool(s) have schema properties that may support completion/complete enumeration.
findings.remediation: Review which argument values are exposed via completion/complete.

findings.title: Prompt template injection confirmed in 'build-shadcn-page'
findings.description: prompts/get for 'build-shadcn-page' reflected the injection payload verbatim in the returned messages, confirming unsanitized argument reflection.
findings.remediation: Sanitize prompt arguments before embedding them in message templates.

findings.title: Prompt template injection confirmed in 'create-dashboard'
findings.description: prompts/get for 'create-dashboard' reflected the injection payload verbatim in the returned messages, confirming unsanitized argument reflection.
findings.evidence:
Payload reflected in messages: {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": {"type": "text", "text": "Create a comprehensive CORVUS_INJECTION_TEST_{{7*7}} dashboard using shadcn/ui v4 blocks and components for react.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Framework: react
- Dashboard Type: CORVUS_INJECTION_TEST_{{7*7}}
- Widgets: CORVUS_INJECTION_TE
findings.remediation: Sanitize prompt arguments before embedding them in message templates.

findings.title: Prompt template injection confirmed in 'create-auth-flow'
findings.description: prompts/get for 'create-auth-flow' reflected the injection payload verbatim in the returned messages, confirming unsanitized argument reflection.
findings.evidence:
Payload reflected in messages: {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": {"type": "text", "text": "Create a complete CORVUS_INJECTION_TEST_{{7*7}} authentication flow using shadcn/ui v4 login blocks and components for react.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Framework: react
- Auth Type: CORVUS_INJECTION_TEST_{{7*7}}
- Providers: CORVUS_INJE
findings.remediation: Sanitize prompt arguments before embedding them in message templates.

findings.title: Server accepts path traversal cursor without validation
findings.description: tools/list accepted cursor='../../../../etc/passwd' and returned a result instead of rejecting it. This may indicate missing cursor validation.
findings.remediation: Validate cursor values; reject non-opaque or path-like cursor strings.

findings.title: Server correctly ignores cancellation of unknown request
findings.description: The server remained responsive after receiving notifications/cancelled for a non-existent request.

findings.title: Cancellation race condition timing detected — server responded normally
findings.description: The request/cancel race did not cause a hang; the server responded to one of the two messages.
findings.remediation: No action required — server handled the race gracefully.
